MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: La Von Granger. Richard John Alexander, Esq. represented Plaintiff, The John Stewart Company. There being no appearance by Defendant, Christopher Wood, the matter was taken off settlement conference, request for jury trial stricken and the trial date is confirmed.
